benefits.description: GHK-Cu worth using but must be used consistently

protocol_notes: Has taken multiple peptides and done extensive research. Has not used GH secretagogues (not worth the money in their view). Would not use BPC-157 or TB-500 without specific need. Would swap MT-II for MT-1 due to selectivity and lower side effect profile. Considers Dihexa too risky/dangerous. Plans to experiment with more compounds. Offered to go in depth on specific compounds if asked.
